mermaidSyntax:
graph TD subgraph GEN[🧬 Genomics Stream] G1[WGS Sequencing] --> G2[Variant Calling] G2 --> G3[SNP/Indel Annotation] end subgraph TX[🧪 Transcriptomics Stream] T1[RNA-seq] --> T2[Differential Expression] T2 --> T3[Pathway Enrichment] end subgraph PRO[🔬 Proteomics Stream] P1[Mass Spec] --> P2[Protein Quantification] P2 --> P3[Post-Translational Modifications] end G3 --> HUB[Integration Hub] T3 --> HUB P3 --> HUB G2 -.->|Variants inform DE| T2 P3 -.->|PTMs validate findings| T3 subgraph INT[Integration Hub Functions] HUB --> MOFA[Multi-Omics Factor Analysis
MOFA] HUB --> NET[Network Analysis] HUB --> CAU[Causal Inference] end MOFA --> B1[Candidate Selection] NET --> B1 CAU --> B1 B1 --> B2[Validation Cohort] B2 --> B3[Clinical Utility] MOFA --> M1[Pathway Modeling] NET --> M1 CAU --> M1 M1 --> M2[Drug Target Identification] MOFA --> PB1[Manuscript] NET --> PB1 CAU --> PB1 PB1 --> PB2[Peer Review] PB2 --> PB3[Journal Publication] B3 -.->|Targeted Validation| G1 B3 -.->|Targeted Validation| T1 B3 -.->|Targeted Validation| P1 style HUB fill:#6366f1,stroke:#4338ca,color:#fff style B3 fill:#10b981,stroke:#059669,color:#fff style M2 fill:#f59e0b,stroke:#d97706,color:#000 style PB3 fill:#3b82f6,stroke:#1e40af,color:#fff
